abilities.name: Rage Aura
abilities.text: If you have more Prize cards left than your opponent, each of Rayquaza ex's attacks does 30 more damage to the Defending Pokemon.

attacks.name: Special Circuit
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokemon is a Pokemon-ex, this attack does 30 damage plus 30 more damage.

tests.name: rage_aura_damage_boost
tests.description: Test Rage Aura adds +30 when behind on prizes

tests.name: special_circuit_ex_bonus
tests.description: Test Special Circuit does +30 vs Pokemon-ex
